title: REPORT AN ISSUE - 211info
text: CITY OF BEND REPORT AN ISSUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community members a service to report experiencing or witnessing a suspected city code violation with a focus on health and safety. Types of issues that can be reported but are not limited to building or land use violations, animal control, illegal dumping or excessive trash, graffiti, street maintenance, camping in the public right of way (including those in vehicles), noise complaints, abandoned vehicles, and public utility issues. 710 NW Wall Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 693-6911 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Dispatch (541) 693-6911 Non-Emergency Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, depending on the issue it can be reported by permit center portal, calling City of Bend non-emergency police, or through Bend Works mobile app platform. Permit center portal and Bend Works require an online account registration. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Bend SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Abandoned Vehicle Reporting/Removal Animal Control Building and Safety Electric Service Connection/Repair Flood/Siltation Control Graffiti Removal Illegal Dumping Reporting Natural Gas Service Connection/Repair Noise Abatement Public Nuisance Reporting * Homelessness Issues Refuse Collection Street Maintenance Water Quality Assurance Water Service Connection/Repair Weed Abatement/Brush Control Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF BEND If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF BEND
